scripts.prestart: npm run clean && npm run build
scripts.dev:win: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$env:Path += ';' + $env:APPDATA + '\npm'; $port = if ($env:FUNC_PORT) { $env:FUNC_PORT } else { '7071' }; $az = Join-Path (Get-Location) 'node_modules\.bin\azurite.cmd'; Start-Process -WindowStyle Hidden -FilePath $az -ArgumentList '--silent --location .azurite --debug .azurite\debug.log'; func host start --port $port"
